sentences.arabic: النِّيَّةُ الصَّالِحَةُ هِيَ أَسَاسُ قَبُولِ الْأَعْمَالِ عِنْدَ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Dobra namjera je osnova za primanje djela kod Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Good intention is the basis for actions being accepted by Allah.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ١].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: „Djela se vrednuju samo prema namjerama“ [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'Actions are but by intentions' [Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَعْمَلُ الْخَيْرَ لِوَجْهِ اللهِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: To znači da musliman čini dobro djelo samo radi Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: This means that a Muslim does good deeds for the sake of Allah alone.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَطْلُبُ الْمُؤْمِنُ مَدْحَ النَّاسِ أَوْ شُهْرَةً فِي الدُّنْيَا.
sentences.translation: Vjernik ne traži pohvalu ljudi niti slavu na ovom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: A believer does not seek people's praise or worldly fame.

sentences.arabic: الْإِخْلَاصُ يَجْعَلُ الْعَمَلَ الْبَسِيطَ كَبِيرًا فِي الْمِيزَانِ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost čini da i malo djelo postane veliko na vagi.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity makes a simple deed great on the Scale.
